scenario.name: Basic UAS responder
scenario.send:
INFO sips:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport];[$2] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field0]@[local_ip:[local_port];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@sbcdev4.com [last_Call-ID:] CSeq: 1 INFO Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=TLS>;q=1;expires=[field1];avaya-actions="presence.initiate-pubsub";reg-id=[call_number];+sip.instance="<urn:uuid:[field0]e96aa1e6-11a9-550b-a009-[field0]>" Supported: replaces Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Performance Test Content-Type: application/spark+xml Content-Length: [len]
<HomeServerUpdatedEvent xmlns="http://xml.avaya.com/endpointAPI"> <statusCode>0</statusCode> <ppmServerAddress>[local_ip]</ppmServerAddress> <sipDomain>avaya.com</sipDomain> <sipServerAddress>[local_ip]</sipServerAddress> <transportTypeInfo> <type>tls</type> <port>5061</port> </transportTypeInfo> <transportTypeInfo> <type>tcp</type> <port>5060</port> </transportTypeInfo> <transportTypeInfo> <type>udp</type> <port>5060</port> </transportTypeInfo> </HomeServerUpdatedEvent>
